title: trifolium steudneri
intro: Trifolium steudneri, also known as Steudner's clover, is a species of perennial flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Trifolium steudneri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. Trifolium steudneri is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically.
